response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to map out scenes, noting where vocal music occurs. 2. Identified the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' performed by Hololive 5th Generation. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Hyper Jumpin'' by PandaBoY (composer). 4. Mapped all scenes, including vocal and non-vocal sections. 5. Compiled the lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure. 6. Adjusted the end time of the final scene to match the actual video duration.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the 'Hololive 5th Generation Live: re:VISION' concert, featuring the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the 5th generation members. The clip includes performances of the song intercut with promotional slides for the upcoming event, merchandise, and ticket information.

scenes.description: An introductory slide featuring an image of the four Hololive 5th Generation members (Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka) with text 'YouTubeチラ見せ枠' (YouTube sneak peek). No music plays.

An atmospheric, instrumental intro scene showing a starry sky with northern lights over decorated Christmas trees. Text appears on screen, including '聖なる夜 4つの星が、ひとつになるとき 奇跡が、はじまる。' (Holy night, when four stars become one, a miracle begins).
The performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the 5th Gen VTubers begins. The scene shows the members singing and dancing on a stage set.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper Jumpin' now
Hyper Jumpin' now
Hyper Jumpin', let's jump out
Come on baby, shine
Heart goes pump it up
Hyper Jumpin', to the dream beyond
More, more
I want more stimulation

Hyper Jumpin' now
Hyper Jumpin'
It's better to act like a child, right?
My tension rises from low pressure
Tipsily, I keep hitting back with @ (mentions)
Driving the cart, a mission to advance
Like this, accelerating the speed
What's at the place we'll reach?
Unstoppable feelings, take a run-up
Let's go beyond the dimension
Come on

Hyper Jumpin', let's jump
Until I get high and turn to ash
Dancing, shake it up
Hyper Jumpin', beyond the sky
More, I want to get closer
(Woh...)
I want to feel my heart pound
Gimme gimme gimme love
(Woh...)
More, I want to fly even higher
Hyper Jumpin' now
Hyper Jumpin'

scenes.description: The scene transitions to promotional screens for the live concert, including information about the 're:VISION' ID card holder, streaming tickets (SPWN/ZAIKO), event dates (2025.12.21), and merchandise details. Instrumental BGM plays in the background.
The atmospheric, instrumental intro scene repeats, identical to the earlier scene.
The performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the 5th Gen VTubers repeats, identical to the earlier performance.

scenes.description: The video ends with promotional text screens and an final look at the Hololive 5th Generation members before fading to black. Instrumental BGM continues.
